initiative: Venus’ XVS token plunges 9% as exploit leaves protocol with bad debt
description: The exploit, which occurred on March 16, didn’t appear to impact XVS prices until analysis showed major holders moving large amounts to exchanges.

initiative: Bitcoin slips to $70,000 as oil surge, Fed pause weigh on risk assets
description: BTC dipped below $70,000 as energy prices spiked and the Fed held interest rates, pressuring crypto and equities.

initiative: Bitcoin OGs dump over $100 million in BTC after hawkish Fed dents rate cut hopes
description: OGs sell as Fed's hawkish stance on rates pressures crypto and other risk assets.

initiative: Forget market hours: Leading ETP firm just opened 24/7 liquidity for tokenized stocks, gold and money market funds
description: ETP market giant Flow Traders just launched 24/7 over-the-counter (OTC) liquidity service for tokenized assets.

initiative: SEC approves Nasdaq's move to support tokenized securities trading
description: The SEC’s approval lets Nasdaq test blockchain-based versions of stocks that trade and settle like traditional shares.

initiative: Fairshake's $10 million Illinois misfire marks first big hitch in crypto political surge
description: The crypto sector's leading political action committee devoted more than 5% of its war chest trying to defeat a Senate candidate who just won her primary.

initiative: Polymarket acquires Brahma to scale blockchain trading infrastructure
description: "Building reliable infrastructure across blockchain networks and traditional financial rails is hard — there are no shortcuts,” said Polymarket CEO Shayne Coplan.

initiative: Crypto Long & Short: When price stops working, yield starts mattering
description: In this week’s Crypto Long & Short Newsletter, Ruchir Gupta writes on how we’re moving toward a true fixed-income market for crypto-native yield. Then, Clara García Prieto on bitcoin becoming mainstream collateral, but most are not prepared for its risks.

initiative: Crypto exchange Kraken freezes multibillion-dollar IPO plan due to difficult market conditions
description: Kraken's parent company filed a draft S-1 registration statement with the SEC in November regarding the proposed initial public offering of its common stock.

initiative: Traders can now bet on the S&P 500 around the clock without ever touching a traditional stock exchange
description: S&P Dow Jones Indices licenses its flagship index for crypto trading on Hyperliquid, as perpetual futures gain traction beyond traditional markets.

initiative: Key U.S. senator on crypto market structure bill negotiation: 'We think we've got it'
description: Senator Cynthia Lummis, at the center of legislative talks, said the discussion is down to nuance and the bill will finally emerge from her committee in April.

initiative: Bank of Korea adds two banks to digital won trials as real-world testing begins
description: Korea's central bank and nine commercial lenders started real-world testing of deposit tokens, including subsidy payments and peer-to-peer transfers.

initiative: Stripe-led payments blockchain Tempo goes live with protocol for AI agents
description: The Stripe-led blockchain targets fast, low-cost digital payments and a new Machine Payments Protocol that allows AI agents pay autonomously.
